diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,154 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main entry point for the Hono framework, exports the Hono class extending HonoBase
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Default to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter when no custom router specified
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base class for Hono with router, request handling, middleware composition
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, Context, Router, METHODS, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, ALL, compose, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, RouterRoute, FetchEventLike, ExecutionContext, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Simple note: Manages router, routes array, and request dispatch via #dispatch and request/fetch methods
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PatternRouter uses regex compilation for route matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, splitByStarRe, Route type, emptyParams, add, match
+- Simple note: Converts paths to regex on add, uses pre-compiled regex for matching
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: LinearRouter iterates routes in order for matching
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, add, match, hasStar, hasLabel, lastIndex, pos, path.indexOf, path.charCodeAt, new RegExp
+- Simple note: Loop through routes, match path, handle :label params with regex or direct matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, Matcher
+- Simple note: Exports both runtime and prepared variants of RegExpRouter
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Builds matchers for runtime use with RegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: Matcher, HandlerData, StaticMap, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, match, matcher
+- Simple name notices: MATCHER, match, method, path, match[0] (regexp), match[1] (handlers), match[2] (static map)
+- Simple note: Creates matcher map from routes, checks static match first, then uses regex fallback
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main RegExpRouter for runtime route registration and matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Trie, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, findMiddleware, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, insert, buildRegExp, buildAllMatchers, HandlerWithMetadata, nullMatcher
+- Simple note: Routes stored internally, matchers built once on first match, uses Trie for organization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class for Trie structure
+- Names noticed: Node, PATH_ERROR, Context, compareKey, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars
+- Simple note: Trie node with children, varIndex for params, #children Map and insert/search methods
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pre-built router variant for serialization/performance
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, emptyParam, emptyParam, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, buildAndExportAllMatchers, add, addPath, addWildcard, indexes, map
+- Simple note: Constructor takes pre-built matchers, add() updates matchers, buildInitParams serializes routes
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class for building regex from routes
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, groups, insert, buildRegExp, buildRegExpStr, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap
+- Simple note: Converts route list to Trie, then to regex with index and param replacement maps
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: SmartRouter delegates to optimal router via try-catch detection
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, routers, routes, match, activeRouter, name
+- Simple note: Tries routers in order, on failure switches to next, caches working router on first successful match
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter uses tree structure for route matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, match, search
+- Simple note: Insert routes into Trie tree, search traverses tree for matches
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class for Trie with method-pattern-based routing
+- Names notice: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, insert, search, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, hasChildren, pushHandlerSets, splitRoutingPath, curNode, curNodes, curNodesQueue
+- Simple note: Trie node with children Map, #methods array, #patterns, performs DFS search with param resolution
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities for router test suites
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, task, match, Router, Params, ParamIndexMap, expect, describe, beforeEach, afterAll, afterEach, after
+- Simple note: Provides test runner with common test cases and skip mechanisms
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, UnsupportedPathError, skip
+- Simple note: Tests include basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, parameter matching, duplicate param handling
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, UnsupportedPathError, skip, ROUTES_LOOP
+- Simple note: Tests omit cases causing UnsupportedPathError on LinearRouter, skips trailing slash test
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter with matcher
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, ParamStash, skip, match, ParamStash
+- Simple note: Tests include return value type, UnsupportedPathError for ambiguous routes, Capture Group tests, complex scenarios
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter combining routers
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, routers
+- Simple note: Very minimal test suite, only tests SmartRouter with two routers
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter implementation using Node class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Direct test of TrieRouter class with runTest framework
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Trie Node class
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, possibleKeys, score, score, hasChildren, curNode, curNodes, curNodesQueue, match, match.test, match.exec, path.length, path.lastIndexOf, path.substring, path.indexOf
+- Simple note: Comprehensive unit tests for Node class functionality
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts; exports PatternRouter that compiles regex on add, matches via static regex compilation
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts; exports LinearRouter that iterates routes in add order, matches path sequentially
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts; exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter; uses Trie for route organization, builds regex once per method, supports wildcard and named params with regex
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts; exports SmartRouter; delegates to multiple routers, switches on first successful match
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts; exports TrieRouter; stores routes in Trie tree, searches via tree traversal

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a comprehensive documentation file for the routing-read-write-ledger benchmark task. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the listed files from the repository
3. Create a markdown document with the specified format
4. Include per-file sections with Purpose, Names noticed, and Simple note
5. Add a Cross-File Checklist section with router families

Let me start by creating the directory and then reading all the files.
